fixtures.name: paradigm_break_assert_validation
fixtures.rationale: Endpoints accept `body: dict = Body(...)` and validate fields with bare `assert` statements instead of Pydantic BaseModel injection. The FastAPI corpus shows 0 instances of `assert` used for request validation at endpoint scope; BaseModel subclasses appear at 384 corpus sites. Unhandled AssertionError produces a 500 rather than a 422, making the break operationally visible. Single axis: assert-based validation vs. declarative Pydantic constraints.

fixtures.name: control_field_validator
fixtures.rationale: A Pydantic BaseModel with @field_validator decorators injected directly as an endpoint body parameter. Adapted from @field_validator usage in tests/test_filter_pydantic_sub_model_pv2.py in the FastAPI source. Uses high-frequency corpus tokens: BaseModel (384 sites), Field with constraints, @field_validator (present in corpus), APIRouter, Depends, HTTPException. No anti-patterns; all validation is declarative and dispatched through Pydantic.
